top3.sql:
SELECT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN card cd ON d.disp_id = cd.disp_id
WHERE cd.type = 'high level'
  AND l.status IN ('A', 'B', 'C'); -- Assuming 'A', 'B', 'C' indicate active or eligible loan status

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'A';

SELECT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN card cd ON d.disp_id = cd.disp_id
WHERE cd.type = 'high level'
  AND l.status IN ('A', 'B', 'C'); -- Assuming 'A', 'B', 'C' indicate active or eligible loan status

SELECT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card cd ON d.disp_id = cd.disp_id
WHERE cd.type = 'high level'
  AND c.client_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT d2.client_id
    FROM disp d2
    JOIN loan l ON d2.account_id = l.account_id
    WHERE l.status IN ('A', 'B', 'C')
  );

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'A';

SELECT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN card cd ON d.disp_id = cd.disp_id
WHERE cd.type = 'high level'
  AND l.status IN ('A', 'B', 'C'); -- Assuming 'A', 'B', 'C' indicate active or eligible loan status

SELECT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card cd ON d.disp_id = cd.disp_id
WHERE cd.type = 'high level'
  AND c.client_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT d2.client_id
    FROM disp d2
    JOIN loan l ON d2.account_id = l.account_id
    WHERE l.status IN ('A', 'B', 'C')
  );

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'high level';

SELECT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN card cd ON d.disp_id = cd.disp_id
WHERE cd.type = 'high level'
  AND l.status IN ('A', 'B', 'C'); -- Assuming 'A', 'B', 'C' indicate active or eligible loan status
